title: Simple Hand Missile
description: Add simple hand-thrown missiles that do not require complex weaponry.
body:
**Simple Hand Missile** is a mod that makes it easy to use missile weapons.

Attack distant targets with hand-thrown missiles that can be created on the Crafting Table.

English and Japanese are available.


## **🚀Missiles**

Currently there are only a few types of missiles, but more variations will be added in the future.

**Hand Missile**

![Hand Missile Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/cwZZ0ud.png)

It is a basic missile that can be held in the hand and fired.

It moves straight in the direction of the player's viewpoint, and if it hits something or 5 seconds pass, it will cause an explosion equivalent to TNT.

**Homing Hand Missile**

![Homing Hand Missile Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/987IjFD.png)

Detects entities within a certain range ahead of the missile and heads for the nearest target.

Hard to hit if the target is moving at high speed.

**Small Hand Missile**

![Small Hand Missile Recipe ](https://i.imgur.com/oDT9XtL.png)

Low explosive power but easy to mass produce.

Maximum stack count is 16 and the charge time required to fire is short.

**ND Hand Missile**

![ND Hand Missile Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/TFpNNFM.png)

This type of missile does not destroy blocks.

Basic performance remains the same.

**ND Homing Hand Missile**

![ND Homing Hand Missile Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/Dxmq1tc.png)

This type of homing missile does not destroy blocks.

ND stands for non destructive.

## Finally

Thank you for reading this far. If you have any problems or requests, please feel free to contact us.

Now, enjoy Simple Hand Missile!
